description: This file contains utility functions for handling and standardizing API error responses, including converting errors to a consistent ErrorResponse format, mapping error types to HTTP status codes, and sending JSON error responses in an Express.js application.

methods.name: _toErrorResponse
methods.description: Converts a thrown error into a standardized ErrorResponse payload, avoiding leaks of sensitive info.

methods.name: _zodDetails
methods.description: Extracts details from a Zod validation error in a stable shape.

methods.name: _statusForError
methods.description: Maps known error types/codes to an appropriate HTTP status code.

methods.name: sendError
methods.description: Public function that sends a standardized ErrorResponse JSON with an appropriate HTTP status code.
